comprehension.question: Which region did the speaker say was moving towards smaller families?
comprehension.hint_ja: より小さな家族に向かっている地域は？

comprehension.question: According to the speaker, what trend is happening in Arabic countries?
comprehension.hint_ja: 話者によると、アラブ諸国ではどんな傾向が起きていますか？

comprehension.question: What 'miracle' happened in Bangladesh in the 1980s?
comprehension.hint_ja: 1980年代にバングラデシュで起きた「奇跡」とは？

comprehension.question: What major health crisis affected African countries in the 1990s?
comprehension.hint_ja: 1990年代にアフリカ諸国に影響した健康危機は？

comprehension.question: Which two countries did the speaker compare directly?
comprehension.hint_ja: 話者が直接比較した2カ国は？

comprehension.question: What happened in Vietnam in the 1980s regarding economics?
comprehension.hint_ja: 1980年代にベトナムの経済で何が起きましたか？

comprehension.question: According to the speaker, what was the main point about African countries?
options: They have caught up with Europe
They still have high birth rates and low life expectancy
They are the fastest growing economies
They have the best healthcare systems
comprehension.hint_ja: 話者によると、アフリカ諸国の主な特徴は？

comprehension.question: What software did the speaker use for the visualization?
What year was this TED talk originally given?
How many countries were included in the dataset?

emphasis_identification.sentence: And we have a completely new world.
emphasis_identification.question: Which word did the speaker emphasize most?
emphasis_identification.hint_ja: この文で話者が最も強調した語はどれですか？

attitude_estimation.question: What was the speaker's general tone in this segment?
attitude_estimation.hint_ja: この区間での話者の全般的なトーンは？

prosodic_structure.question: When presenting data comparisons, the speaker typically...
options: Used dramatic pauses between each country
Spoke at a steady, consistent pace
prosodic_structure.hint_ja: データの比較を提示するとき、話者は通常…
